name: github-project-automation
description: A tool to automate the creation of GitHub projects, tags, and tasks based on a configuration file.

scripts.core-contracts: node --env-file=.env index.js --owner OpenAudit-Brasil --project 'OpenAudit Brasil — Roadmap' --json './src/data/tasks/openaudit-core-contracts/tasks.json' --type issue
scripts.search-api: node --env-file=.env index.js --owner OpenAudit-Brasil --project 'OpenAudit Brasil — Roadmap' --json './src/data/tasks/openaudit-search-api/tasks.json' --type issue
scripts.observability: node --env-file=.env index.js --owner OpenAudit-Brasil --project 'OpenAudit Brasil — Roadmap' --json './src/data/tasks/openaudit-observability/tasks.json' --type issue
scripts.entity-catalog: node --env-file=.env index.js --owner OpenAudit-Brasil --project 'OpenAudit Brasil — Roadmap' --json './src/data/tasks/openaudit-entity-catalog/tasks.json' --type issue
